purpose: Explain why the null confirmatory result is informative and decision-relevant.

diagnostics.effect_size_detectability: Observed delta is near zero and far below practical threshold; no material gain detected.
diagnostics.confidence_interval_interpretation: Intervals are consistent with negligible effects under the confirmatory protocol.
diagnostics.threshold_comparison: Magnitude fails practical relevance criterion by a wide margin.
diagnostics.latency_penalty_interpretation: Runtime overhead exists (~7.23%) without quality benefit.
diagnostics.baseline_competitiveness: Mean baseline remains competitive; no evidence supports replacement.
diagnostics.uncertainty_calibration_impact: Current uncertainty weighting shows no detectable retrieval benefit in this slice.

reversal_requirements: Positive primary effect direction on nDCG@10.
Practical effect at or above preregistered threshold.
Uncertainty interval excluding negligible near-zero effects.
Independent replication with acceptable compute-quality tradeoff.

recommended_manuscript_usage.tmlr: Include as dedicated negative-result interpretation subsection and diagnostics table.
recommended_manuscript_usage.arxiv: Include as dedicated negative-result interpretation subsection and diagnostics table.
recommended_manuscript_usage.joss: Mention only as an example generated artifact, not as a central scientific claim.
